conjecture_5_10_at_345.statement:
conjecture_5_10_at_345 (k : nat) : (3 <= k <= 5)%N ->
  forall N : nat, exists T : tournament, kcritical k T /\ (N < #|T|)%N

conjecture_5_10_at_k3.statement:
conjecture_5_10_at_k3 (N : nat) :
  exists T : tournament, kcritical 3 T /\ (N < #|T|)%N

question_5_9_fails_at_k3.statement:
question_5_9_fails_at_k3 (L : nat) :
  exists T : tournament,
    [/\ kcritical 3 T, (L < #|T|)%N
      & forall S : {set T}, (3 <= ω̄(sub_tournament S))%N -> S = [set: T]]

conjecture_5_10_at_k4.statement:
conjecture_5_10_at_k4 (N : nat) :
  exists T : tournament, kcritical 4 T /\ (N < #|T|)%N

question_5_9_fails_at_k4.statement:
question_5_9_fails_at_k4 (L : nat) :
  exists T : tournament,
    [/\ kcritical 4 T, (L < #|T|)%N
      & forall S : {set T}, (4 <= ω̄(sub_tournament S))%N -> S = [set: T]]

conjecture_5_10_at_k5.statement:
conjecture_5_10_at_k5 (N : nat) :
  exists T : tournament, kcritical 5 T /\ (N < #|T|)%N

question_5_9_fails_at_k5.statement:
question_5_9_fails_at_k5 (L : nat) :
  exists T : tournament,
    [/\ kcritical 5 T, (L < #|T|)%N
      & forall S : {set T}, (5 <= ω̄(sub_tournament S))%N -> S = [set: T]]

ck_conj1_delta3.statement:
ck_conj1_delta3 (D : orientedDigraph) :
  0 < #|D| -> (forall v : D, 3 <= outdeg v) -> 6 <= ell D

ck_conj1_delta3_path.statement:
ck_conj1_delta3_path (D : orientedDigraph) :
  0 < #|D| -> (forall v : D, 3 <= outdeg v) ->
  exists x : D, exists s : seq D, dipath x s /\ size s = 6

ck_conj1_delta2.statement:
ck_conj1_delta2 (D : orientedDigraph) :
  0 < #|D| -> (forall v : D, 2 <= outdeg v) -> 4 <= ell D

ck_theorem4_oriented.statement:
ck_theorem4_oriented (D : orientedDigraph) (delta : nat) :
  0 < #|D| -> (forall v : D, delta <= outdeg v) ->
  2 * delta - (delta - 1)./2 <= ell D

lemma7.statement:
lemma7 (D : orientedDigraph) (delta : nat) :
  0 < #|D| -> (forall v : D, delta <= outdeg v) ->
  2 * delta <= ell D \/
  exists S : {set D},
    [/\ S != set0, #|S| <= delta
      & forall v, v \in S -> 2 * delta - ell D <= outdeg_in S v]

no_short_strong3.statement:
no_short_strong3 (H : orientedDigraph) :
  (forall v : H, outdeg v = 3) -> 0 < #|H| -> strongb H ->
  ell H <= 5 -> False

omegabar_lexprod_ge.statement:
omegabar_lexprod_ge :
  ω̄(S) + ω̄(H) <= ω̄(lexprod_tournament S H) + 1

vt_kcritical.statement:
vt_kcritical (k : nat) (v0 : T) :
  vertex_transitiveb (T : diGraphType) ->
  kcritical k T = (ω̄(T) == k) && (ω̄(del_tournament v0) == k.-1)

omegabar_del_vt.statement:
omegabar_del_vt :
  vertex_transitiveb (T : diGraphType) ->
  forall u v : T, ω̄(del_tournament u) = ω̄(del_tournament v)

kcritical_proper_sub.statement:
kcritical_proper_sub (k : nat) (T : tournament) (S : {set T}) :
  kcritical k T -> S != [set: T] -> (ω̄(sub_tournament S) <= k.-1)%N
